subcodes.first_line: The inscribed Book beareth witness unto it, and the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, doth testify that verily it hath been traced by the Finger of Power in this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مسطور یشهد له المهیمن القیوم و انه رقم من اصبع القدره فی هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
